strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript/Node.js, React, and multiple languages
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, directly matching AI agent requirement
Strong engineering practices background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing frameworks
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Limited explicit cloud platform breadth (AWS CDK noted, but GCP/Azure and Kubernetes depth unclear)

response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer well above the 6+ year bar, with current hands-on work in TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent infrastructure including MCP — a strong alignment with the role's primary stack and AI requirement. Gaps include no stated Nest.js or Kotlin experience and limited recent Java work, though the breadth of languages and frameworks suggests quick ramp-up is plausible.
